programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: The final part of Ali Hamidi and Bobby Zamora's mission at Iktus in France kicks off on the cameras as the lads try to catch a koi each and a carp of 50 pounds or more.

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Dutch Round as the 4.542km track at the TT Assen Circuit pushes the riders to their limits.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky IV
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Dolph Lundgren, 1985. Rocky Balboa vows to get revenge when a Soviet boxer kills his friend Apollo Creed in the ring.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Part Two: Comedy-drama series. Dennis returns to Newcastle and meets up with Oz, and Ally is unhappy to find that his Jaguar has had a run-in with a skip.

programme.title: Auf Wiedersehen, Pet
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a group of British builders. The lads take a step up in the world when they are asked to convert Thornley Manor into timeshare units.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are confronted by a newsman with information on an unsolved robbery, but why are the pair being photographed.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Terry leaves his fingerprints on a stolen lorry while doing a job for Arthur.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Higgins goes on a jungle trip with a group of young offenders as part of a programme to help improve their self-esteem.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A rookie cop with two civilian jobs on the side and mounting debts goes to work for a loan shark in a desperate bid to foot the bills.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint investigates a murder that leads him to a cult obsessed with ancient Rome.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken helps some traders and Harry and Alex try to win a big security contract, but they soon find themselves at odds with their partner.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic 70s police drama series. Regan and Carter are on the case when a pair of robbers are themselves robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The sixth series' World Championship tournament has arrived, but only one of a stacked group of contenders can hoist the Giant Nut.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: In a episode parodying a typical 1940s murder mystery, Thomas features as a private eye who is investigating a case in San Francisco.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A teenager accidentally kills one of a mobster's henchmen during a robbery gone wrong and ends up being hired by a rival gangster.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint is suspected of committing a spate of jewel thefts from hotels on the French Riviera.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken has a spine-chilling confrontation with the supernatural when he is called in to guard expensive antique fittings in an eerie manor.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic 1970s police drama series. Regan and Carter investigate an art deal that is more than it seems, and ends up in a wasteground shootout.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur puts his savings into an old safe in the lock-up, but his nest egg is in danger when an old acquaintance arrives from Marbella.

programme.title: Gallagher PREM Unleashed
programme.desc: Action from the 13th round of fixtures, featuring Bristol v Gloucester, Leicester v Newcastle, Exeter v Northampton, Bath v Harlequins and Sale v Saracens.

programme.title: Junk and Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison meet the owner of a delectable collection before going to the Cotswold Oil Engine and Preservation Society's famous bring and buy sale.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Roger Moore and Christopher Walken, 1985. 007 does battle with a industrialist who plans to destroy Silicon Valley and corner the world's microchip market.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Roger Moore and Christopher Walken, 1985. 007 does battle with a industrialist who plans to destroy Silicon Valley and corner the world's microchip market.

programme.title: English Football League Highlights
programme.desc: Action from across the Football League, including Coventry v Portsmouth, Norwich v Derby, QPR v Swansea and Middlesbrough v Sheffield Wednesday.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: In a episode parodying a typical 1940s murder mystery, Thomas features as a private eye who is investigating a case in San Francisco.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A teenager accidentally kills one of a mobster's henchmen during a robbery gone wrong and ends up being hired by a rival gangster.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint is suspected of committing a spate of jewel thefts from hotels on the French Riviera.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Ken has a spine-chilling confrontation with the supernatural when he is called in to guard expensive antique fittings in an eerie manor.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic 1970s police drama series. Regan and Carter investigate an art deal that is more than it seems, and ends up in a wasteground shootout.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: Three Minutes to Fame or Shame: US robot combat series. Three minutes in the BattleBox separate eight bots from the Round of 16, but only four of them can emerge triumphant.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Thomas is attacked by an army of small-time crooks sent by a Mexican crime boss who is trying to prevent him testifying in a court case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. A singer fears for her father when he is released from prison after serving 14 years for a murder that he did not commit.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Another adventure for freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. A girl who claims to be Hitler's daughter leads the Saint in a merry little jig involving neo-Nazis.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: A surprise party is planned for Ken, so Harry pretends that he is in need of a minder in order to get him out of the way for a while.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter are called in when alarm bells start ringing all over their patch. Who is setting them off - and why.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. A local property developer offers to buy Arthur's lock-up and car lot, but Terry has his suspicions and turns to DS Jones for help.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series. Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz are excited by the prospect of a visit to a home in Iowa which is reportedly brimming with antique items.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jessee is left stranded and helpless by an avalanche. Meanwhile, Ray Veilleux faces Dalton with a premonition of death hanging over his head.

programme.title: Rocky V
programme.desc: Boxing drama film sequel starring Sylvester Stallone and Talia Shire, 1990. Rocky Balboa adjusts to life after boxing but is then drawn back into it by an exciting new prospect.
